ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Record important events and discoveries in Book of Centuries.
[ ] Use the lattice method to check your multiplication in math. Try multiplying a 9-digit number by a 9-digit number using the lattice method and the traditional method. Which do you find easier?
[ ] Use short division to check your long division.
[ ] Record important events and discoveries in Book of Centuries.

[ ] Record important events and discoveries in Book of Centuries.
[ ] Solve the puzzles on p.116.
[ ] Make up your own math puzzles.
